Card.Name: Time to Awaken
Card.ScriptDesc: On Use Gain 2 Poise. At 6+ Poise, restore 2 Light

Behaviour.Desc: [On Clash Win] Gain 2 Poise
[On Crit] Deal bonus damage equal to Speed difference

Card.Name: Steady Effort
Card.ScriptDesc: Deal +15% more damage for every 2 Haste (max, 100%). [On Use] Draw 1 Page. If this unit has one of the fastest Speed Dice, draw 1 additional Page.

Behaviour.Desc: [On Hit] Inflict 2 Rupture. [On Crit] Inflict 2 Rupture
[On Hit] Deal bonus damage equal to 1/4th of Haste

Card.Name: One Brave Step
Card.ScriptDesc: [On Use] Restore 2 Light. If afflicted with Bind, restore 1 additional Light

Behaviour.Desc: [On Clash Win] Halve Bind on self (once per Scene). Add a 3~8 Counter Block Dice to queue

Card.Name: Fruits of Labor
Card.ScriptDesc: Dice on this Page have a 50% chance of not reducing Rupture stacks when this unit has 5+ Haste. [On Use] Gain 3 Poise

Behaviour.Desc: [On Hit] Inflict 3 Rupture. If target has 15+ Rupture, apply 2 more Rupture
[On Hit] Deal bonus damage equal to 1/3rd of Haste

Card.Name: Racing the Flow
Card.ScriptDesc: [Combat Start] Evade Die gain +3 Power this Scene

Behaviour.Desc: [On Clash Win] 35% chance to gain 1 Haste next Scene
[On Hit] Deal bonus damage equal to Light

Card.Name: Highlander
Card.ScriptDesc: [On Use] Restore Light equal to half of Haste on self (rounded down). If 3 or more Light was restored, draw Pages equal to half of Light restored (rounded up).

Behaviour.Desc: [On Clash Win] Double Stagger Damage dealt from deflect. Last Dice gains +2 Min and Max value.

Card.Name: Photon Arc
Card.ScriptDesc: [Combat Start] Whenever this unit wins at least 2 Clashes on a Page they use, all their non-Counter Dice gain 1 Power for the Scene. [On Use] Restore Light equal to half of Haste on self, rounded down. If 3 or more Light was restored, draw Pages equal to half of Light restored (rounded up)

Behaviour.Desc: [On Crit] Target's Resistance is treated as Fatal
[On Crit] Target's Resistance is treated as Fatal

Card.Name: Flash Forward
Card.ScriptDesc: [Combat Start] The first Dice of every Combat Page used by this unit this Scene gains Power equal to Haste on self (Max, 5)

Behaviour.Desc: [On Clash Win] Gain 3 Haste next Scene

Card.Name: Triumphant Pulse
Card.ScriptDesc: Dice on this Page deal 1% more damage for every 0.7% missing HP on self. At 85% missing HP, this automatically maxes out to 70%. Additionally, Crits on this Page lose twice the Poise, but increases damage dealt by Crits to x1.5

Behaviour.Desc: [On Hit] Inflict 3 Rupture
[On Hit] Inflict 3 Rupture
[On Hit] Inflict 5 Rupture. [On Crit] Target's Resistance is treated as Weak
[On Hit] Inflict 5 Rupture. [On Crit] Target's Resistance is treated as Weak

Card.Name: Dawnlit Ashen Trail: Cinderella Gray
Card.ScriptDesc: Dice on this Page deal 1% more damage for every 0.5% missing HP on self. At 50% missing HP, this automatically maxes out to 150%. Additionally, Crits on this Page lose twice the Poise, but increases damage dealt by Crits to x2.0

Behaviour.Desc: [On Hit] Consume all Rupture. [On Crit] Target's Resistance is treated as Fatal

Card.Name: Triumphant Pulse
Card.ScriptDesc: Dice on this Page deal 1% more damage for every 0.7% missing HP on self. At 85% missing HP, this automatically maxes out to 70%. Additionally, Crits on this Page lose twice the Poise, but increases damage dealt by Crits to x1.5

Behaviour.Desc: [On Hit] Inflict 3 Rupture
[On Hit] Inflict 3 Rupture
[On Hit] Inflict 5 Rupture. [On Crit] Target's Resistance is treated as Weak
[On Hit] Inflict 5 Rupture. [On Crit] Target's Resistance is treated as Weak

Card.Name: Dawnlit Ashen Trail: Cinderella Gray
Card.ScriptDesc: Dice on this Page deal 1% more damage for every 0.5% missing HP on self. At 50% missing HP, this automatically maxes out to 150%. Additionally, Crits on this Page lose twice the Poise, but increases damage dealt by Crits to x2.0

Behaviour.Desc: [On Hit] Consume all Rupture. [On Crit] Target's Resistance is treated as Fatal
